author: ArchiveExplorer
text:
yesterday someone leaked a full quant trading system on GitHub

before they deleted it i forked everything

5,000 lines of code. 7 modules. 25 mathematical factors

funds use this system to manage millions

i studied it for a week. then pointed it at crypto markets on polymarket

here's the full breakdown 
you can feed this to your claude and build the same thing

for just $200

ARCHITECTURE:

Python thinks, analyzes, calculates 
C++ executes orders in 5-10ms

data → factors → AI → strategy → risk → execution

DATA. 4 streams simultaneously:

- Binance WebSocket: prices every second, orderbook at 20 levels
- AlphaVantage: news with sentiment score from -1 to +1
-X: mention volume, engagement, influencer activity
- On-chain: BTC flows to/from exchanges

cache in Redis (<1ms). history in TimescaleDB

FACTORS:

the system calculates 25+ factors every 5 minutes: 
- price momentum over 1.5 hours 
- acceleration = momentum_30m - momentum_1h 
- RSI(14): above 70 = overbought, below 30 = oversold
- MACD: fast EMA(12) minus slow EMA(26)

microstructure: 
- Order Flow Imbalance = (buy volume - sell volume) / total. above +0.3 = strong buyer pressure 
- VPIN = |buy_vol - sell_vol| / total. above 0.75 = smart money is moving

volatility: 
- VaR(95%) = mean - 1.645 × std. answers: "what's my max loss in 95% of cases?"
- Sharpe = (return - risk free) / volatility. above 1.0 = good. above 2.0 = excellent

every factor converted to z-score and combined:

Composite Score = Σ (weight × z_score)
top 25 assets by score go to work

AI:

ClowdBot reads every news article and returns JSON

every historical article stored as a 384-dimensional vector

PROBABILITY MODEL

Geometric Brownian Motion:
P(BTC > target price) = N(d1) d1 = [ln(current/target) + (σ²/2)T] / (σ√T)

then 4 adjustments on top:
- momentum: +/-5% 
- AI sentiment: +/-7% 
- order flow: +/-2% 
- historical patterns: +/-8%

compare final probability against polymarket price if edge > 10%: enter

RISK

- Quarter Kelly for position sizing 
- max 5% bankroll per trade 
- drawdown 15% = bot stops 
- VaR < 3% per day 
- correlation between positions < 0.7 
- never take more than 1% of market liquidity

key insight is don't hold to expiry. trade the movement, not the outcome

cost: 
→ Binance API: free 
→ OpenAI: $50-100/month 
→ AWS EC2: $120/month 
→ monitoring: free

- total: $200-300/month -

code is open source. formulas above. you already have claude

the only thing between you and a working system is one free evening

author: Motivator_Peter
text:
TRON FEBRUARY 2026 INTEGRATIONS

Expanding AI, Payments, DeFi & Global Access

February 2026 marked a strategic expansion phase for TRON DAO, strengthening its role in stablecoin settlement, AI infrastructure, payments, gaming, and education.

I remember I posted about them one by one. But here is a clear breakdown of the integrations that matter and why they matter.

1️⃣ Bank of AI (AINFT)

➪ What it is: A permissionless AI gateway enabling access to advanced models like GPT-5 and Claude Opus through Web3 authentication.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Enables on-chain AI transactions

✔︎ Supports agent-based payments

✔︎ Positions TRON as infrastructure for autonomous AI economies

This bridges AI execution with blockchain-based settlement.

2️⃣ NEXUS CROSS Pay

➪ What it is: TRC-20 USDT integration into CROSS Shop gaming platform with 0% platform fees.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Enables low-cost in-game stablecoin payments

✔︎ Reduces friction for global gamers

✔︎ Expands TRON into high-frequency micro-transactions

Gaming becomes a stablecoin-native economy.

3️⃣ @WalletConnect

➪ What it is: Native TRON support across 600+ wallets and 70,000+ dApps.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Simplifies wallet-to-dApp connectivity

✔︎ Improves onboarding

✔︎ Strengthens DeFi and payment interoperability

Accessibility drives liquidity and usage.

4️⃣ TRON Academy Partnerships

➪ New collaborations with:

✔︎ Dartmouth College

✔︎ Princeton University

✔︎ University of Oxford

✔︎ University of Cambridge

➪ Purpose:

✔︎ Advance Web3 education

✔︎ Support dApp development

✔︎ Build long-term blockchain talent pipelines

Institutional alignment fuels sustainable ecosystem growth.

5️⃣ @coolwallet

➪ What it is: Hardware wallet integration supporting TRON Energy rental via USDT or TRX.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Lowers transaction costs

✔︎ Optimizes resource management

✔︎ Maintains full self-custody

Cost efficiency meets hardware-level security.

6️⃣ @Polymarket

➪ What it is: Native TRON deposits enabled for decentralized prediction markets.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Removes bridge friction

✔︎ Lowers access costs

✔︎ Expands TRON utility in event-driven markets

Real-world forecasting meets low-fee infrastructure.

7️⃣ @KoloHub

➪ What it is: Crypto wallet and card platform integrating TRC-20 USDT payments.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Connects stablecoins to real-world spending

✔︎ Enables near-instant settlement to payment cards

✔︎ Expands consumer-facing crypto adoption

Digital assets move closer to everyday commerce.

8️⃣ @Gemini

➪ What it is: Enabled TRX deposits and withdrawals.

➪ Why it matters:

✔︎ Expands regulated access

✔︎ Increases liquidity

✔︎ Supports institutional participation

Exchange-level support strengthens ecosystem credibility.

𒊹︎︎︎ Strategic Impact

These integrations reinforce TRON’s core advantages:

✔︎ High throughput

✔︎ Low transaction costs

✔︎ Stablecoin dominance

✔︎ Expanding AI infrastructure

➪ The focus is clear: programmable payments, autonomous intelligence, global scalability, and institutional alignment.

TRON is not just adding partnerships, it is building layered infrastructure across AI, gaming, finance, education, and consumer payments.

The ecosystem is moving from growth to structural maturity.

#TRONEcoStar @justinsuntron @trondao

Este comerciante recibe las noticias antes que nadie gracias a la mejor herramienta OSINT en Polymarket.

Obtuvo una ganancia de más de 19.900 dólares gracias a la herramienta que difundió la información 9 minutos antes de que CNN la anunciara oficialmente.

→ La herramienta detecta movimientos inusuales de aeronaves hacia Dubái a las 6:47.  
→ Un mercado basado en las tensiones en Oriente Medio cotiza a 0,08.  
→ CNN informa 9 minutos después de los primeros ataques y el mercado sube a 0,76.

Esa es la ventana donde debes obtener la información, antes de que entren al mercado todos los que esperan la próxima “NOTICIA DE ÚLTIMA HORA”.

Es una herramienta excelente para OSINT y para monitorear noticias, pero te estoy preparando para que lo hagas aún mejor rastreando todos estos datos en Polymarket.

Empieza a saber.

author: dunik_7
text:
yesterday a friend messaged me: "i have 48 hours before the lawyers find out. you need to see this"

he worked as a data engineer at a hedge fund in Zurich. he got fired on friday

on monday, his vpn was still working

he downloaded 3 jupyter notebooks before his access got cut

one of them was called polymarket_edge_model_v4_FINAL.ipynb

THE CORE IDEA:

the fund doesn’t predict the outcome of the event. they predict the PANIC of other traders

when the price moves sharply, 80% of players close at a loss. the fund takes the other side

"liquidity vacuum trade"

TRIGGER — 3 conditions at the same time:

/ price >2% in 90 seconds

/ volume >3x the average

/ 70%+ of orders on one side

the bot trades AGAINST the crowd

expected_price = EMA(200) × (1 + sentiment_offset)

deviation >12% = entry

stop at 25%

take profit at EMA ±3%

win rate: 73.2% across 1,847 trades. sharpe 2.7

i rewrote it in python over the weekend. 172 lines

first week: +$412 from $1,500

the formulas are above. claude will handle the rest.

author: 0x_Discover
text:
$400K in under a month.

This OpenClaw setup on Polymarket is reportedly averaging:

• ~$5 per second 
• ~$300 per hour 
• ~$7K per day

Profile:https://t.co/Kd1ZlAL0pB

Copytrade → https://t.co/GNQBeFgIre

It continued operating even after Polymarket removed the 500ms delay.

Strategy Breakdown

• Trades only 5-minute BTC Up/Down markets 
• Buys YES + NO during the first ~4 minutes 
• Enters when combined price drops below $1 
• Locks the spread before expiry6,823 trades executed.

Pure arbitrage structure. No directional bias.

It compounds small inefficiencies repeatedly — increasing position size as balance scales.

Not prediction.
Not narratives. 

Just automation + pricing gaps.

As always: verify execution conditions, liquidity, and fees — spread arbitrage edges compress quickly once crowded.

author: 0xPhilanthrop
text:
My friend said, “You’ll never make real money on Polymarket.”

A month later I sent him this profile:

$38,700 profit in 30 days.

He asked how. I didn’t answer.

But here it is.

NOAA isn’t a weather app. It’s a federal forecasting system running atmospheric models 24/7 with decades of satellite data.
24–48 hour forecast accuracy: ~94%+.

Meanwhile, most traders check a retail app and guess.

That gap is the edge.

NYC, Saturday: NOAA shows a 93% chance of hitting 74°F.
Polymarket prices that bucket at 9¢.

The bot buys at 9¢.
Market corrects to 54¢.
Exit.

~6x — no prediction, just mispricing.

I funded it with $100 and went to sleep.

By morning it had executed 30+ trades.

Dallas heat. Chicago cold. Miami humidity.
Every few minutes it scans multiple cities for disagreements between market price and forecast probability.

Rules are simple:

Only buy below 15¢

Only sell above 45¢

Max $2 per position

Copytrade → https://t.co/UlvSrUzZGN

Small size. Controlled risk. Repeated edge.

3,100+ trades
79% win rate
$38,700 in one month starting from $100

My friend still says you can’t make real money on Polymarket.

The bot already proved otherwise.
